summary: Implemented issue #52 policy-ablation benchmark support, verified tests and focused lint/type checks, committed and opened PR #57.

issueReviewed.title: Add policy-ablation benchmark to isolate raw Neuraxon dynamics
acceptanceChecklist: Tests can instantiate a tissue with no semantic policy and verify the raw decoder path is used.
The report states raw-network performance separately from semantic-bridge performance.
No claim of Neuraxon generalization is made from policy-covered observations.

implementation: Added semantic_policy_enabled support to AgentTissue and tracked last_action_source plus raw decoder actions.
Extended tissue benchmark results with policy_mode, action_source, normalized_benchmark_action, and raw_decoder_output metadata.
Added run_policy_ablation_benchmark with semantic_bridge, raw_network, and semantic_coverage_audit modes.
Updated diagnostics and report artifacts to distinguish semantic bridge wins from raw network decoder output.
Generated benchmarks/results/policy_ablation.json and refreshed related benchmark/diagnostic artifacts.

verification.outputSummary: 181 passed, 3 warnings from pre-existing scripts/smoke_test.py tests returning bool.

verification.command: uv run ruff check src/neuraxon_agent/tissue.py src/neuraxon_agent/tissue_benchmark.py src/neuraxon_agent/benchmark_diagnostics.py tests/test_tissue.py tests/test_tissue_benchmark.py tests/test_benchmark_diagnostics.py tests/test_benchmark_report.py

uv run mypy src/neuraxon_agent/tissue.py src/neuraxon_agent/tissue_benchmark.py src/neuraxon_agent/benchmark_diagnostics.py tests/test_tissue.py tests/test_tissue_benchmark.py tests/test_benchmark_diagnostics.py tests/test_benchmark_report.py
verification.outputSummary: Success: no issues found in 7 source files.
